topic.title: Additional Office Hours (Tuesday, 11AM-12PM EST)
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

For those who weren’t able to attend today’s office hours and have questions, I’ll be hosting an additional set of office hours tomorrow, Tuesday from 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM EST.

Feel free to drop in during this window if you’d like to ask questions or get clarification on the assignment or course material.

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
